articles.title: Cancer couldn’t stop her. Now she’s running the Boston Marathon again.
articles.description:
Stephanie McHugh is running the 2026 Boston Marathon for the New England Patriots Foundation.

The post Cancer couldn’t stop her. Now she’s running the Boston Marathon again. appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Stephanie McHugh will run the 2026 Boston Marathon after overcoming cancer.
She is raising funds for the New England Patriots Foundation.
Her story inspires Boston residents facing similar challenges.
